title: Here comes another bubble
body: Another [video about web 2.0](http://www.xarop.com/que-es-la-web-20/ "Another video"), this time in a humorous way, makes us think about a new bubble like the *dotcom* of the year 2000. How is it possible that Facebox has the same value as Ford? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fi4fzvQ6I-o
